column2: Back

- Guckt's Bild, erläuft dort Beschreibungen vum Kachtier.
- Wat ass speziell an diesem Kachtier?
- Diskutiert mat eurem Nopper.
- Umher dovun, vu Valencia aus, iwwer den alternativen Wohnungsbau.
- Höher der lodene Herr Lukawa Konzer, Verantworter vun ProRéveil gefelgen op.
- Wéi bekannt ginn ass, datt op dem Ällefabriksterräng e Wohnkachtier fir ongeféier 2000 Leit soll stoe.
- War eise Büro direkt interesséiert.
- Mir schaffen scho laang am Beräich ökologesch a sozial fonnt.
- An dat war wierklech eng Geleeënheet, fir villes vun deem Nächste ze realiséieren.
- Mir hunn elo e Projet ausgeschafft fir 375 Haiser an 375 Appartementer op engem Terrain vun 27 Hektar.
- Dat ass esou grouss wéi 38 Fussballsterräng.
- Wichteg fir eis war, datt am Kachtier net iwwerall Autoen däerfen fueren.
- Mir setzen op douce Mobilitéit, dat heescht op all Fortbewegungsmëttel, dat net motoriséiert ass, also de Vëlo, Trotinett, déi eegen Féiss.
- Mir ënnerstëtzen och de Carsharing.
- An elo am Parking dobausse natierlech och Plazen fir elektresch Autoen opzemaachen.
- Fir datt Mobilitéit awer garantéiert ass, muss de Kachtier natierlech gutt un den ëffentlechen Transport ugeschloss sinn.
- Do ass et net wäit wäit, et fueren dräi Buslinnen heiansdo.
- An zënter dem leschte Mount ass och eng Tramhaltestell hei op 300 Meter.
- Wat de Stroum ugeet, setzen mir op erneierbar Energien.
- All Haus huet Solarpanneauen.
- Ausserdeem ginn mir mat Stroum vun de Wandmille am Norden vum Kachtier versuergt.
- Wann mir ökologesch soen, däerfen mir natierlech de Recycling net vergiessen.
- Dat ass kloer, datt et op puer Plazen Container gëtt fir Pabeier, Glas a Plastik ze recycléieren.
- All Haus huet do reng extra Bëschte fir de Kompost, deen dann am Gemeinschaftsguert verwäert ka ginn.
- Apropos Gemeinschaftsguert.
- De Guert ass a kleng Parzellen opgedeelt, déi een pachte kann.
- Jiddereen, deen mat schafft, kann déi gemeinsam Infrastrukturen notzen an natierlech och vun der Recolte profitéieren.
- Et ass e Plaz, wou vill sozial Kontakter entstinn, a wou net nëmmen Tobegärtner sech treffen.
- Wichteg war eis och, datt de Kachtier ganz gréng ass.
- D'Appartementer an d'Residenzen selwer hunn zwar keng grouss Terrainen mat grousse Gärten, mee si hunn Zougang zu gemeinsame Gréngflächen.
- Wichteg ass awer och, datt et kleng Geschäfter am Kachtier ginn, fir datt een net fir all Klengkeet an de grousse Supermarché muss fueren.
- Dat fördert de lokale Commerce an et muss een net fir alles den Auto oder de Bus huelen.
- Am Zentrum vum Kachtier gëtt et e Treffpunkt, eng Aart Halle, déi fir verschidde Zwecker, wéi zum Beispill kulturell Evenementer, benotzt ka ginn.
- Hei gëtt et och e klengen Café, wou d'Leit sech gär treffen.
- Nieft dem Guert an dem Spillplaz ass dat de Deel, wou déi meescht sozial Kontakter entstinn.
- Alles an allem schéngen d'Leit dovun ganz zefridden ze sinn.
- Look at the picture, there are descriptions of the animal shelter running there.
- What is special about this animal shelter?
- Discuss with your neighbor.
- Around it, from Valencia, about the alternative housing construction.
- Higher up, the crowded Mr. Lukawa Konzer, responsible for ProRéveil, followed.
- As is known, there should be a housing shelter on the Ällefabriksterräng for about 2000 people.
- Our office was directly interested.
- We have been working in the ecological and socially minded field for a long time.
- And that was really an opportunity to realize many of the next things.
- We have now drafted a project for 375 houses and 375 apartments on a 27-hectare site.
- That is as large as 38 football fields.
- Important for us was that cars are not allowed to drive everywhere in the shelter.
- We rely on gentle mobility, meaning any non-motorized means of transport, i.e., bicycles, scooters, those on foot.
- We also support car sharing.
- And now in the parking lot outside, of course, also space for electric cars to be charged.
- To ensure mobility, of course the shelter must be well connected to public transport.
- It is not far away, there are three bus lines that sometimes run.
- And since last month there is also a tram stop here at 300 meters.
- Regarding electricity, we rely on renewable energies.
- Each house has solar panels.
- In addition, we are supplied with electricity from the windmills in the north of the shelter.
- When we speak ecologically, we must not forget recycling.
- It is clear that there will be containers in some places for paper, glass, and plastic to recycle.
- Each house has its own special bins for compost, which can be used in the community garden.
- By the way, community garden.
- The garden is divided into small plots that one can rent.
- Anyone who works there can use the shared infrastructures and naturally also benefit from the harvest.
- It is a place where many social contacts arise, and where not only garden hobbyists meet.
- It was also important for us that the shelter is very green.
- The apartments and residences themselves do not have large plots with big gardens, but they have access to common green areas.
- It is also important that there are small shops in the shelter, so one does not have to drive to the big supermarket for every little thing.
- This promotes local commerce, and you do not have to take the car or bus for everything.
- In the center of the shelter there is a meeting point, a kind of hall, which can be used for various purposes, such as cultural events.
- Here there is also a small café where people like to meet.
- Next to the garden and playground, that is the area where most social contacts arise.
- All in all, people seem to be very satisfied with it.

- Nei Wohnprojeten zu Letze Buersch.
- Wiel villen europäische Länder ass och zu Letze Buersch fandefuhd bezuelbarem Wunraum net so einfach.
- Preisefuhnde Wohnungen an den Terren sinn an den letzten Jahren immens geklommen.
- Et entstehen lo immer mei Wohnprojeten met Heiser, dei just kleing Terren hun, met fo gemeinsame Gerd profiteren oder Zugang zu engem Park hun.
- Des Nei Wohnquartieren gehn außerdem nohhaltisch geplankt.
- Den ökologischen Aspekt bei der Wasser an Energieversorgung, bei den Baumaterialien as ganz wichtig.
- Proximität, die reduzert Benutzung von Autoen an Förderung von sozialer Interaktion sinn anerwichtisch Punkten.
- So könne leibisch Wohnquartieren entstehen an können och ramsische Obdachstoß spielen an zu Fausanschul gehen.
- Viel von diesen Projekten gi vum Staat finanziell unterstützt an gehéieren zum sogenannten sozialen Wohnungsbau.
- Bei viele von diesen neuen Projekten kommen awer och nei Wohnformen an den Spill.
- New housing projects at the latest Buersch.
- How many European countries also in the latest Buersch find affordable living space not so easy.
- Price hikes for apartments and land have risen immensely in recent years.
- New housing projects with houses that only have small plots of land, with shared gardens benefiting or access to a common park.
- These new neighborhoods are also planned sustainably.
- The ecological aspect in water and energy supply, in building materials as very important.
- Proximity, which reduces car use and promotes social interaction, are important points.
- Thus living neighborhoods can arise and can also play a rambish homelessness role and go to Fausanschul.
- Many of these projects are financially supported by the state and belong to the so-called social housing.
- In many of these new projects, however, new forms of living also come into play.

- New housing projects at the latest Buersch.
- How many European countries also in the latest Buersch find affordable living space not so easy.
- Price hikes for apartments and land have risen immensely in recent years.
- New housing projects with houses that only have small plots of land, with shared gardens benefiting or access to a common park.
- These new neighborhoods are also planned sustainably.
- The ecological aspect in water and energy supply, in building materials as very important.
- Proximity, which reduces car use and promotes social interaction, are important points.
- Thus living neighborhoods can arise and can also play a rambish homelessness role and go to Fausanschul.
- Many of these projects are financially supported by the state and belong to the so-called social housing.
- In many of these new projects, however, new forms of living also come into play.

- Wunngenossenschaften.
- Beim Konzept von der Wunngenossenschaft oder Kooperativ sinn wichteg Wäerter zum Beispill Geselligkeet, Nachhaltigkeit an abordbar Präisser.
- Membere vun enger Genossenschaft engagéieren sech, dës Wäerter ze respektéieren.
- Et dierf partizipativ getraff ginn, wou d'Bierger hir Wunnraim kollektiv plangen, schafen an agéieren kënnen.
- D'Sozialvielfalt gëtt gefördert, Generatiounen liewen zesummen an esou entsteet Engruppendynamik.
- D'Eenzelmembere vun der Genossenschaft kafen Deeler vum Projet a kënnen do fir hire bëllegste Loyer wunnen.
- Housing cooperatives.
- In the concept of the housing cooperative or cooperative, important values include sociability, sustainability, and affordable prices.
- Members of a cooperative commit themselves to respecting these values.
- It may be participatively organized, where citizens can collectively plan, create, and act on their living spaces.
- Social diversity is promoted, generations live together, and this creates group dynamics.
- The individual members of the cooperative buy shares in the project and can live there for their cheapest rent.

- The individual members of the cooperative buy shares in the project and can live there for their cheapest rent.

- Zu Lëtzebuerg gi Wunnengemeinschaften emmer méi populär.
- Dobäi ënnerscheede een tëscht zwou Zorten:
- Entweder deelt een sech eng Wunneng oder en Haus mat anere Leit an huet do just een Zëmmer fir sech,
- oder et wunnt een an enger Residenz bei eeneen an huet do déi verschidde gemeinschaftlech Raim zur Verfügung.
- Virun allem jonkt Leit deelen sech dacks eng Wunneng,
- fir e bësse méi gënschteg liewen ze kënnen an ausserdem soziale Kontakt ze hunn.
- Mee och Projeeër fir Wunngemeinschaften fir Senioren fannen emmer méi.
- Hei geet et drëm, datt eeler Leit sou laang wéi méiglech autonom liewe kënnen
- an dobäi awer net isoléiert sinn.
- Si hunn eng eege Wunneng,
- mee kënnen och vu gemeinschaftleche Raim profitéieren.
- Den Alldag gëtt hinnen doduerch erliichtert, datt si Hëllef am Stot kréien
- an eventuell vu Fleegedéngschter profitéiere kënnen.
- Och esou Projeeën hunn dacks en ekologeschen Aspekt,
- well ee vill Wäert op Proximitéit léet
- an och oppasst, datt den ëffentlechen Transport garantéiert ass.
- Bei enger anerer Wunnform liewen Mënsche Ratiounen zesummen.
- Zil hei ass virun allem d'Isolatioun vun eelere Leit ze verhënneren.
- Dës Form vu Wunnen fërdert Solidaritéit tëschent de Generatiounen.
- Dëst kann och mat sozialem Wunne gekoppelt sinn,
- wann et zum Beispill an enger Residenz engersäits Sozialwunnengen fir eeler Leit mat niddergem Akommes
- an anersäits kleng Studentewunnengen gëtt.
- Generatioune liewen ënnert engem Daach
- a kënne sech géigesäiteg gesellschaftlech ënnerstëtzen.
- Déi eeler kënnen zum Beispill mol fir déi jonk mat kachen
- an déi jonk kënne bei Computerproblemer hëllefen oder akafe goen.
- Eng aner Form vu solidareschem zesummeliewen fënnt een bei Projeeën,
- wou Leit, déi zu Lëtzebuerg Asyl ugefrot hunn, a Familljen opgeholl ginn
- amplaz datt si mussen an engem Foyer wunnen.
- Si kënnen dacks gratis bei de Famillje wunnen
- a sinn dofir kënnen am Haus an am Stot ze hëllefen.
- Dat fördert hir Integratioun
- an dréit zu engem bessere Versteesdemech bäi.
- In Luxembourg, housing communities are becoming increasingly popular.
- There is a distinction between two types:
- Either people share a dwelling or a house with other people and have only one room for themselves,
- or they live in a residence together with others and have access to various communal spaces.
- Especially young people often share a dwelling,
- to live a bit more affordably and also to have social contact.
- But there are also projects for housing communities for seniors that are increasingly found.
- Here the aim is that elderly people can live autonomously for as long as possible
- and still not be isolated.
- They have their own dwelling,
- but can also benefit from communal spaces.
- Everyday life is made easier for them, so that they can receive help locally
- and possibly benefit from care services.
- Such projects also often have an ecological aspect,
- because a lot of value is placed on proximity
- and also ensure that public transport is guaranteed.
- In another housing form, people share ratios.
- The goal here is primarily to prevent isolation of older people.
- This form of living promotes solidarity between generations.
- This can also be linked with social housing,
- when, for example, in a residence there are social apartments for older people with low incomes
- and small student apartments on the other side.
- Generations live under one roof
- and can help each other socially.
- The elderly can, for example, cook for the younger ones from time to time
- and the youngsters can help with computer problems or go shopping.
- Another form of solidarity living is found in projects
- where people who have applied for asylum in Luxembourg are taken in by families
- instead of having to live in a foyer.
- They can often live with families for free
- and are thus able to help in the house and at home.
- This promotes their integration
- and contributes to a better mutual understanding.

- Ech wollt scho zanter laang meng Wunnung zu Lëtzebuerg kafen, mee do gouf et e grousse Problem: Ech hat net genuch Suen.
- De Schlëssel war d'Onofhängeg Konferenz vun der Wunngenossenschaft Teieren.
- Dat ass e Konzept, wou ee weder richtege Proprietär nach normale Lokataire ass.
- Ech hunn dat eng immens flott Iddi fonnt an hu mech do gemellt.
- Ech hu Päere kaaft a sinn lo Member vun enger Kooperativ.
- Ech däerf selwer matplangen a Suen, wat mer beim Wunnen wichteg ass.
- Herno gëtt demokratesch ofgestëmmt, a mir géréieren dat Ganzt zesummen.
- Aspekter wéi ökologescht an nohaltegt Wunne gi respektéiert.
- Och finanziell ass et ganz interessant.
- De Loyer ass net sou héich wéi bei normale Wunnengen,
- an ech hunn Garantie, datt ech a menger Wunnung bleiwe kann, och ouni Proprietär ze sinn.
- Ech muss awer soen, datt et vill Zäit kascht,
- datt et vill Reunioune gëtt an dacks laang Diskussiounen an der Demande vu vun der Genossenschaft.
- I wanted for a long time to buy my apartment in Luxembourg, but there was a big problem: I did not have enough money.
- The key was the Independent Conference of the Teieren Housing Cooperative.
- That is a concept where there is neither a real owner nor a normal tenant.
- I found that an incredibly cool idea and joined there.
- I bought shares and am now a member of a cooperative.
- I may also participate with money, which is important for living.
- Here it is democratically decided, and we manage the whole thing together.
- Aspects like ecological and sustainable living are respected.
- Financially it is also very interesting.
- The rent is not as high as in normal apartments,
- and I have a guarantee that I can stay in my apartment, even without owning a property.
- But I must say, it takes a lot of time,
- that there are many meetings and often long discussions in the demand of the cooperative.

- Am Ufank huet hien an engem Foyer gewoont.
- Bis hien en offizielle Statut huet, derfir net zu Lëtzebuerg schaffen.
- Dat ass ganz schwéier fir hien.
- Elo woont hie bei eis an hëlleft vill am Haus mat.
- Hie passt och dacks op d'Kanner op oder geet se an d'Schoul sichen.
- Fir eis ass dat eng grouss Entlaaschtung.

- Mir hunn och scho bis Arabesch geléiert.
- We took Hakim in three months ago at our place.
- He is 35 years old and comes from a war zone.
- At first he lived in a foyer.
- Until he has an official status, he may not work in Luxembourg.
- That is very hard for him.
- Now he lives with us and helps a lot around the house.
- He also often watches the children or takes them to school.
- For us, that is a big relief.
- It is also nice to get to know a person with a different cultural background a bit better.
- That helps a lot to understand his situation better.
- Sometimes we notice that I, too, would like to be with my family alone sometimes, even though Hakim is with our family.
- We still have problems understanding each other, because Hakim's language skills are not that good yet.
- We have also learned some Arabic.

- Mir kénten jo einfach mol dan ausgucken, a fleischt ass jo eppes für eis do bai.
- Joal, kénnst du wanscht leeft e bësse mir realistisch bleiwen?
- Wie gesot, ein Gwunning an der Stad ass zu deier für eis.
- Et wier natilisch e bësse mi deier, mäi mir géfen och luspureren.
- Wann ma mino bei der Stad wunne géfen, da breischte mir ne zu dat mam Autos pureren,
- a mir géfen och viel Zeit spuren, a ech steng net all Dag mam Auto am Stau.
- Anderrei, mir géfen bestimmte bësse Zeit gewonnen, mäi mir hâte nochmann a Liewensqualitöt.
- Mir missten zum Beispiel obeise Gart verzichten, a mir hâte viel mi Kamedior gestankt, wann ma an der Stad wunne géfen.
- A mir hujo och eis Fründi hai wunnen, a fein operen.
- Dat ass jo awer och wichtig.
- Ech mengen, da dass Fründ eis nid vergiessen géfen.
- Och wann mir an Stadplönnere géfen, géfe sie eis bestimmt regelmässig besische kommen.
- Jo, dofuna sinn ich eigentlich och überzeugt, mäi wie has et mam Noah?
- Hien öd och funn hai am Dürf, an hieh geht loges wunnern Tschol.
- Ja, dat stimmt, mäi ech mengen, hieh geht sicher ne Fründ fannen, an die Tschol weh hai ass jo awer och ein Katastrof.
- Hie misst all Dag mam Bus ob Kiele fohren.
- Dat fonn ich net gutt.
- Ech hätt lever, hieh kénnt zu Fouss an Tschol goen.
- A wie has et mad eise Babysitter?
- Du wies wie schwer et war, ein vertauensvoll Person ze fannen.
- Ech fonneme sollten alle so losse wie et ass.
- Mäi jo, si, fon mir et net probieren, da künne mir et nid rausfannen.
- Kénnst ma de Gefahle machen.
- Wann man eisch fonnen, bleift jo alle so wöehet de Moment ass.
- Okei, okei, da moche ma dat old.
- Ech kamol de Sam frohen, die schafft jo an der Immobiliebranche.
- Vleicht höt deine gute Rot für eis.
- Dat wär super!
- It annoys me that we have to beg the owner for everything.
- He just wants to foist a eviction on us at the Garage Park, but nothing ever happens.
- I’d rather move to the city.
- My little fashion show but it makes it cold quickly.
- If we could read it, we could evaluate it.
- Living in the city is expensive, and besides I like to just stay home often.
- I may also stay here.
- Why do you want to plainer?
- I’m bored here, and the Boss needs a half-ew facility in the city.
- I could go out spontaneously to party or drink with a girlfriend,
- If someone lives here, everything must always be organized on the fly around the house.
- We could just go out then, and there is something for us there.
- Yes, could you please stay a little more realistic?
- Like I said, an apartment in the city is expensive for us.
- It was naturally a bit expensive, but we also want to save.
- If we move into the city, we’ll have to clean up the cars,
- and we’ll also save a lot of time, and I don’t want to spend every day in traffic.
- On the other hand, we’ll gain some time, but we’ll have more life quality.
- For example we would have to give up the garden, and we would miss a lot of my medicine if we moved to the city.
- And we also have our friend living there, and a fine operation.
- That’s also important.
- I think our friend wouldn’t forget us.
- Even if we look in city plans, they would surely regularly come visit us.
- Yes, basically I’m convinced, but what about Noah?
- He also lives in the village, and it seems like there is a lot of trouble.
- Yes, that’s true, but I think he could find a friend, and that trouble there is a catastrophe.
- He has to go by bus to Kiel every day.
- I don’t think that’s good.
- I’d rather go by foot to the village.
- And how about our Babysitter?
- You know how hard it is to find a trustworthy person.
- We should all just go as it is.
- My yes, if we don’t try it, we won’t figure it out.
- Can you make the decision?
- If we can decide, everyone remains as they are right now.
- Okay, okay, let’s do it the old way.
- I heard of Sam, he works in the real estate sector.
- Maybe your good luck will help us.
- That would be great!

- Möje Bernerdät, dat ass awer flott, wat de Mech besiche kënns.
- Mäjo, ech si näwe och richteg gefreut, zisch Plaz aus dem Alubaurenhoff gemaach hues.
- Et wärt zwar elo lange mir hei, mee ech kann mich awer noch drun erënneren, wie et hei ausgesin huet.
- Et wärt ziemlich alles al a futti.
- Oh jo, dat kanns de ächt soen.
- Et ass Wirklich scho ganz vil geschafft gin, och von mir nach lange gedetisch sin.
- Komm, mir gien mol en Tour machen.
- Guck, hei ass die gréisst Veränderung.
- Oh, mäjo, die Altscheier ass jo ofgeraubt gin.
- Dat wird bestimmt viel erbest.
- Bleift dat lo so eidel do, oder wärt gett mat dem Ecke mach?
- Mir hu lange evoluäiert, mee mir hu neizelodd decidiert, wärt mir do machen.
- Op der Platz gët de Wandergard ugebaut.
- Dat gescheed awer erst an enger zwete Fass.
- Jo, dat ass en flott Idee, an do ower sin och nei Derchluken angebaut gin, oder irenischmisch.
- Nee, do is recht.
- Die aner Fenstere ware schon ealanet medicht.
- Erlor is do och e bisse mi helder banne.
- Wärt hudda mat der Fassad gemach?
- Fassad has richlächst och fertig gin.
- Si has naturlisch isoläiert an döno och neu ugestroch gin.
- Wann die Lohre mi bisse Zeit hun, da ginn neu Sonnenschein neu Luchten hei und mauegangen.
- Jo, dat gët bestimmt flott, an da kann i nuwosorg mol mi lange do bausse sitzen, och von et schon deisch darf.
- Magge nee, dat wärt Sonja och gesot.
- An hai bei der Afahrt sin die Alpawischdäng schon all rausgeraubt gin.
- Die müsse nach durchs neu Erazat gin, mee mir sin eis nach ned eins, wärt loddo hinner könnt.
- Guck an hai fir am Eck ass e klenge Kräidergärd ugelocht gin.
- Sonja kafft jo so ger, an hot wollt net lang op de verzichte.
- So wie ich Sonja kennen, geht dem dat awer nach ned duer, oder?
- Natürlich ned, wann de Wandergard bis fertig ass, da bleift nach e Steckwies übrig.
- Da gitt nach e gosse Gemäisgart ugelocht, an et gitt och nach en klei Spielplatz fir eis Enkelkanner obgeriecht.
- Mei komm, mir ginn dann lomol bis ruckgucken.
- De Bannen ass och so gut wie alles frischgemerkt gin.
- Good morning Bernerdät, it’s really nice that you can visit me.
- Well, I’m also really happy that you made a place out of the old barn yard.
- It will be a long time here now, but I can still remember what it looked like here.
- It was pretty much all old and broken.
- Oh yes, you can really say that.
- A lot of work has already been done, even by me after a long time of thinking.
- Come on, let’s take a tour.
- Look, here is the biggest change.
- Oh, well, the old barn has been torn down.
- That will definitely be a big improvement.
- Will it stay empty there, or will something be done with that corner?
- We have thought about it for a long time, but we only recently decided what we will do there.
- A wall garden will be built on the site.
- But that will only happen in a second phase.
- Yes, that’s a great idea, and new dormer windows have also been added there, or something like that.
- No, that’s right.
- The other windows were already sealed and insulated.
- Erlor is also a bit brighter inside.
- Will anything be done with the facade?
- The facade is almost finished too.
- It has, of course, been insulated and then newly painted.
- When the shed has some time, new sunshades and lights will be installed here and there.
- Yes, that will definitely be great, and then I can sit outside for a long time, even when it’s already dark.
- Don’t be silly, that’s what Sonja said too.
- And on the way here, the alpawischdäng have all been removed.
- They still need to be replaced, but we’re not there yet, it would be nice if you could wait.
- Look, a small herb garden has been planted in the corner.
- Sonja loves to buy that kind of thing and didn’t want to wait long to give it up.
- Knowing Sonja, that won’t be enough, right?
- Of course not, when the wall garden is finished, there will still be a small meadow left.
- Then a large vegetable garden will be planted, and there will also be a small playground for our grandchildren.
- Come on, let’s go and take another look.
- Inside, almost everything has been freshly renovated.

- Bonjour, hei ass Clemens.
- Pavésteinen sinn haut geliwwert ginn an zwee direkt virun eis Garagennofahrt.
- Et wier gutt, wann déi loos ugeleeër, wéi méiglech kéinte geluecht ginn.
- Wéini kënnt Dir dat maachen?
- Oh, déi hätten der eigentlech net dorkomme geliwwert ginn.
- Mä dat ass kee Problem.
- Mir këmmeren eis direkt dorëms.
- Hello, this is Clemens.
- The paving stones were delivered today and two are directly in front of our garage entrance.
- It would be good if they could be left accessible, as possible.
- When can you do that?
- Oh, they actually should not have been delivered there.
- But that's not a problem.
- We will take care of it right away.
